ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shapes" (
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shape */,
  "shape_type" TEXT /* Type of shape (e.g., polygon, circle, rectangle) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color assigned to the shape */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the shape belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the shape was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the shape was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the shape */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Indicates if the shape is locked for editing */,
  "lock_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who locked the shape */,
  "lock_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shape was locked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shape_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shapes_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shapes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shapes_lock_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("lock_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coordinates" (
  "coordinate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coordinate */,
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shape the coordinate belongs to */,
  "x0" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the shape's starting point */,
  "y0" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the shape's starting point */,
  "x1" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the shape's ending point */,
  "y1" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the shape's ending point */,
  "z_index" INTEGER /* Z-index to manage layering of shapes */,
  "locked" INTEGER /* Indicates if the coordinates are locked */,
  "lock_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who locked the coordinates */,
  "lock_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coordinates were locked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coordinate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coordinates_shape_id FOREIGN KEY ("shape_id") REFERENCES shapes ("shape_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coordinates_lock_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("lock_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shape_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shape the change was made to */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "previous_data" TEXT /* Previous state of the shape before the change */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the shape belongs to */,
  "is_undone" INTEGER /* Indicates if the change has been undone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shape_history_shape_id FOREIGN KEY ("shape_id") REFERENCES shapes ("shape_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shape_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, administrator, viewer) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date the project was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the project */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the project is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_shapes" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shape */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "shape_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_users" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* Role of the user within the project (e.g., designer, admin, viewer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, shape updated) */,
  "logged_at" TEXT /* Date the activity was logged */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser and operating system) */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the activity was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shape_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shape */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shape_attributes_shape_id FOREIGN KEY ("shape_id") REFERENCES shapes ("shape_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data of the report */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the report belongs to */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., usage, performance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
